overall.description: First-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, wet reflective pavement, and futuristic architecture. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character walking past commercial buildings, crossing intersections, and moving through covered urban walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow city sidewalk with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past construction barriers and dumpsters

entered.detail: Red neon sign reading 'Kabayan Foods' mounted on building wall
White and red striped temporary construction barriers
Piles of garbage bags next to dumpsters
Futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow city sidewalk at night, passing construction barriers and dumpsters. The red neon 'Kabayan Foods' sign illuminates the left side while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: large illuminated intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk and enters wide open intersection
black futuristic vehicle passes by on the right while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk, moving toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction
black futuristic sedan driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: Large vertical digital billboard displaying a person's face with pink neon borders
Wide pedestrian crosswalk with bold yellow stripes
Tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide neon-lit intersection with bold yellow crosswalk stripes. Large digital billboards display advertisements on the right while pedestrians and vehicles move through the crossing. The camera moves steadily across the wet asphalt toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with overpasses and digital advertisements

events.description: steps onto sidewalk after crossing intersection, turning right to follow the street
multiple futuristic vehicles pass by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various neon signs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking in opposite direction
futuristic sedan driving down the street with headlights on

entered.detail: Large blue neon sign with Japanese characters and 'HO-TE' visible
Elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street
Floating cubic billboard with rotating advertisements suspended above street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a neon-lit commercial sidewalk with the blue 'HO-TE' sign prominent on the left. Vehicles pass by on the right while futuristic billboards and an overpass structure loom ahead. The street is lined with various storefronts and digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with dense neon signage

events.description: enters covered area beneath the overpass structure
lighting becomes slightly dimmer and more diffused under the overpass cover

agents.ego_description: continuing down the covered walkway passing under the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue pants walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: Illuminated corporate sign for 'DELAMAIN' with white lettering
Green neon sign with Japanese text characters
Large concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway. The 'DELAMAIN' corporate sign and green Japanese neon signs illuminate the left side while concrete support columns line the path. The environment feels more enclosed with the overpass structure now directly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district, moving from narrow side streets into a wide urban intersection before descending into a covered pedestrian underpass. It begins on a cramped sidewalk passing construction barriers and dumpsters, where the red glow of a Kabayan Foods sign reflects off the wet pavement beneath towering skyscrapers. As the path opens up, the camera moves steadily across a wide intersection marked by bold yellow crosswalks and massive digital billboards. The scene then shifts back to a commercial sidewalk dominated by a blue HO-TE sign and passing traffic, moving toward a looming overpass structure. Finally, the environment becomes enclosed as the camera enters a covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, flanked by concrete columns and the corporate glow of Delamain and green Japanese neon signs.
